rows.label: qev019001_MSG0001
rows.name:
Pardon me, but you wouldn't happen to be a BLADE,
would you? If so, I have a matter to consult with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0002
rows.name:
I am an engineer who manufactures the parts used
in Orphe products.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0003
rows.name:
But lately, we have been unable to obtain Miranium,
which serves as raw material, and the production line
has been stalling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0004
rows.name:
Realizing we couldn't go on like this, I sent my
subordinate, Nonboiton, to collect Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0005
rows.name:
However, I have lost contact with him. The Miranium
has yet to arrive after all this time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0006
rows.name:
I am in a great deal of trouble. At this rate, production
will eventually stop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_JNK0010
rows.name: Point Out

rows.label: qev019001_SEL0011
rows.name:
Warn him that he should worry about his comrade's
life rather than the Miranium.

rows.label: qev019001_JNK0020
rows.name: Sympathy

rows.label: qev019001_SEL0021
rows.name:
Speak to him out of genuine concern that
the Miranium hasn't arrived.

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0007
rows.name:
Of course I am worried. If he is gone, not only do we
lose the Miranium he obtained, but we also lose
valuable labor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0008
rows.name:
It would be an exceedingly large loss.
I cannot overlook that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0009
rows.name:
...What is it? Is there a problem?
If there is no problem, I will continue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0010
rows.name:
Yes, because Orphe products are often custom-made,
they are not easily replaceable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0011
rows.name:
At this rate, production will halt, and as a result,
our survival rate will decrease.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0012
rows.name: Therefore, I would like you to rescue Nonboiton.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0013
rows.name:
We may have lost contact, but he went mining wearing
the advanced equipment our company prides itself on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0014
rows.name:
He must surely be succeeding better than an Earthling
and obtaining a massive amount of Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0015
rows.name:
Please, bring Nonboiton back to NLA and save our
company.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0016
rows.name:
He headed for the South Meimou Mountain Summit in
Shiraki no Tairiku. I will send you the coordinates[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0017
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—That's it. Even if he happens to be dead, please
make sure to bring back just the Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0018
rows.name:
There are many corporations in NLA, you see.
Securing Miranium has become difficult as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0019
rows.name:
Therefore, I sent Nonboiton in an attempt to pioneer our
own unique acquisition route...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0020
rows.name:
Goodness, what on earth is he doing?
At this rate, the production line will stop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0021
rows.name: This is troubling...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0022
rows.name:
Nonboiton has returned, but it seems he was unable
to obtain any Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0023
rows.name:
At this rate, our company's parts manufacturing line will
stop, and it will eventually affect the production of
Orphe Parfait as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0024
rows.name:
...Is expanding this Frontier Net truly such a
difficult task?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev019001_SEL0031
rows.name: Explain that it is difficult without experience.

rows.label: qev019001_JNK0040
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev019001_SEL0041
rows.name: State that installing Data Probes is not difficult.

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0025
rows.name:
Ever since you crash-landed on this planet, you have
constantly been doing it[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0026
rows.name:
It's true, that experience might be greater than the
technology we possess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0027
rows.name: That is wonderful... I see, you must have an aptitude for it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Hmm, it seems it is better to leave this matter to a
BLADE, just as Nonboiton proposed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0029
rows.name:
How about it? I will provide a reward, so could you
gather 4200gm of Miranium for us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0030
rows.name:
Please save our company from this predicament with the
techniques you have cultivated thus far.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0031
rows.name:
From what I hear from Nonboiton, it seems installing
Data Probes is difficult for those with low combat
capabilities like us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0032
rows.name:
Eventually, we will reward you with Orphe science.
For now, please use your power to help our company.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0033
rows.name: Mining 4200gm of Miranium... I leave it to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0034
rows.name:
Welcome back, [ST:playername ].
Is the Miranium mining going well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_JNK0050
rows.name: Hand over

rows.label: qev019001_SEL0051
rows.name: Hand over 4200gm of Miranium.

rows.label: qev019001_JNK0060
rows.name: Do not hand over

rows.label: qev019001_SEL0061
rows.name: Do not hand it over for now.

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0035
rows.name:
Oh! With this much Miranium, we will be able to produce
parts without any issues.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0036
rows.name:
It seems asking you was the right choice. This is your
reward, please accept it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0037
rows.name: Come to think of it, do you know a woman named Kirsty?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0038
rows.name:
Since it seems she also teaches aliens how to handle
Frontier Net, Nonboiton and I went to meet her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0039
rows.name:
Oh my... She made us realize it right then and there. The
act of going around installing Data Probes is truly a
life-threatening endeavor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0040
rows.name:
It is completely out of the question for powerless Orphe
like us to carry it out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0041
rows.name:
As expected, when it comes to Frontier Net, we have
no choice but to rely on you BLADEs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_JNK0070
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev019001_SEL0071
rows.name: Tell him to leave it all to you.

rows.label: qev019001_JNK0080
rows.name: Support

rows.label: qev019001_SEL0081
rows.name:
Encourage him, saying that if he keeps trying,
he will surely succeed.

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0042
rows.name:
I see, truly reliable. Just as I thought, you are the
optimal partners for us Orphe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0043
rows.name:
Please continue to lend us your strength by installing
even more Data Probes in the future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0044
rows.name:
Considering the time spent on effort versus the results,
it is obvious that relying on you is better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0045
rows.name:
We will prepare rewards commensurate with that risk,
so please continue to lend us your strength.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0046
rows.name:
At this rate, our company's production line will
stop completely...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019001_MSG0047
rows.name: Please, hurry and obtain the Miranium for us.[ST:wait ]
